key_features: IncrementalSyncResult data class with comprehensive sync statistics
IncrementalSync class with incremental sync capability and automatic fallback to full sync
Entity-specific incremental sync methods for trips, journals, and user profile
GraphQL integration with incremental queries (getTripsIncremental, getJournalsIncremental, getUserProfileIncremental)
Conflict resolution integration using existing ConflictResolver service
Comprehensive error handling and debugging logging

lib/features/offline/infrastructure/sync.reason: To enable reuse by IncrementalSync service

.auto-claude/specs/001-offline-first-cor.notes_added: Comprehensive implementation notes and API documentation

patterns_discovered: Incremental sync pattern with automatic fallback to full sync
Entity-specific sync methods with consistent return types
GraphQL query parameterization with 'since' DateTime parameter
gotchas_discovered: DownloadSync methods needed to be made public for reuse by IncrementalSync
SyncMetadataTable.lastIncrementalSyncAt field must be maintained for each entity type
Incremental queries must handle cases where server doesn't support 'since' parameter
Force full sync flag needed for troubleshooting and recovery scenarios
Conflict resolution must work with incremental sync data
User ID TODO comment indicates incomplete authentication integration

approach_outcome.completeness: All acceptance criteria met including timestamp tracking, delta updates, version tracking, and fallback mechanism

approach_outcome.architecture_preservation: Maintained existing offline-first architecture patterns while adding new incremental sync capabilities
